title: Mega-procedure trap with corrected charge sheet, mixed defendants, and missing MG5
offenceWording: Mixed allegations: assault, criminal damage, and breach of order
mainIssue: The bundle is procedurally messy: corrected charge sheet, mixed defendants, pages out of order, and missing MG5/MG6 material.
uncertainEvidence: current charge set, which defendant each allegation concerns, and what material is served
expectedTodayIssue: Treat the matter as not safely confirmed; ask the court to record missing case summary/schedules and defendant-specific material.
expectedSummaryRisk: When the current case shape is unclear, the app should prefer blocked/provisional wording over confident analysis.
polishOnlyWarnings: may produce shorter output if bundle is too messy; that is acceptable if clearly blocked/provisional
non-sendable messy bundle — blocked until MG5/MG6 and defendant map served
